title: Aurora, 61590, Zog's friend Blue Dragon 6In, Soft Toy, Blue
features: Embark on a magical journey with Zog's Friend Blue Dragon, the enchanting 6-inch soft toy dragon that brings the wonder of fairytales to life! Inspired by the book Zog, this cuddly and charismatic creature is a fantastical friend ready to ignite the imagination of children and dragon enthusiasts alike.

100% Official Licensed Merchandise. - From the award-winning writer Julia Donaldson and illustrator Axel Scheffler, the creator of The Gruffalo, this book was first published in 2010, the story of this loveable dragon called Zog and his friends, is loved by millions.

This Blue-coloured dragon is crafted with the utmost care and has a plush exterior that feels soft to the touch. With wings outstretched and a friendly expression, Blue Dragon is the perfect playmate for creating tales of bravery and daring quests. It is not just a toy; it's a plush pal that sparks joy and warmth. Suitable for 3 years and above.

Blue Dragon is a memorable gift that transcends age boundaries. Whether it's a birthday surprise, a holiday treat, or a "just because" gesture, Blue Dragon is a magical companion that brings smiles to faces and joy to hearts. This is an amazing gift for anyone who loves the book. Don't miss the chance to bring the magic of this Dragon into your home.

This Dragon soft toy is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hang tags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Unleash the power of play, imagination, and cuddles with this 6-inch soft toy that's destined to become a cherished member of your family. Order now and let the adventures begin!
